subcodes.first_line: The spirit of existence, may my life be a sacrifice unto Him, conveys unto the enraptured handmaiden of God, Fa'izih, most glorious greetings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قوله روح الوجود له الفدا بامه الله المنجذبهه فائزه تحیت ابدع ابهی ابلاغ دار
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
